title: symphytum × ferrariense
intro: Symphytum × ferrariense, also known as Ferrari's comfrey or broad-leaved comfrey, is a hybrid plant species within the borage family that is native to Europe. It is a perennial herb that has been used for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Symphytum × ferrariense include its ability to accelerate wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and improve bone density. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical creams, making it a versatile remedy for various health issues.
